explanation: The code implements a grid-based game where player A (the computer) and player B (the user) take turns placing their markers ('A' and 'B', respectively) on an n x n board. The game starts by initializing the board and then allowing the user to input their move coordinates. After each move, the computer tries to place its marker on the board using a set of rules until the board is full or a condition to end the game is met. The current state of the board is printed after each turn, ensuring players can view their previous moves.
subject: Session 7 Q2 B
summary: This project is a simple interactive game where the computer and the user play by placing their markers on a grid.
